# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently supported versions:

| Version    | Supported       | Reason / Description      |
|------------|-----------------|---------------------------|
| 1.3.1      | Yes             |                           |
| 1.3.0      | Yes             |                           |
| 1.3.0-beta | Unsupported     | Fatal bug                 |
| 1.2.3      | Not recommended | No persist memory storage |
| 1.2.2      | Only Windows    |                           |
| 1.2.1      | Only Windows    |                           |
| 1.2.0      | Only Windows    |                           |
| 1.2.0-beta | Unsupported     | Fatal bug                 |
| 1.1.3      | Only Windows    |                           |


## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please:

- Do NOT open a public issue
- Email: Hakizumi@outlook.com

We will respond within 3-5 business days.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure.
